patient.query: I guess I’ve always felt like I have to be the best at my job. It’s like if I slip up even a little, it feels like I’ve failed completely. And when there’s a disagreement, it just makes me so anxious—I’m not sure how to handle it without feeling like everything’s falling apart. It's exhausting.
